steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: Before the blank: made several innovations to the steel—part of an independent clause. After the blank: three noun phrases separated by commas and “and”: wheels so the instrument could be easily transported, a cover to protect the pans, and amplification so the sound could be better heard

steps.title: Apply the colon rule
steps.content: A colon introduces a list that elaborates on an independent clause. A comma treats the drum as one of four items, no punctuation leaves the relationship unclear, and a semicolon incorrectly assumes independent clauses. That matches choice B — B is correct.
